sub_modules.conv1d_tap_window: Combinational tap selector that forms the causal FIR window from the current input sample and four stored prior samples.
sub_modules.conv1d_mac5: Combinational fixed 5-tap multiply-accumulate using hardcoded weights [2, 8, 12, 8, 2].
sub_modules.conv1d_normalize: Combinational normalizer that right-shifts the MAC result by GAIN_W to produce the filtered output width.
